case_title: IOS CAPITAL, LLC VS. RIAZ VALANI et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-04-2002 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE JUL-19-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF IOS CAPITAL, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VALANI, RIAZ IND AND DBA KMS STRUCTURED FINANCE $14,535.59 PRINCIPAL, $1,800.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,603.94 INTEREST, $156.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $18,095.53, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF SEP-04-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF IOS CAPITAL, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT VALANI, RIAZ IND AND DBA KMS STRUCTURED FINANCE DOES 1 TO 50, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUL-19-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-20-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUN-20-2002
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AND THE 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION. AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 50, INCLUSIVE
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $156.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT VALANI, RIAZ IND AND DBA KMS STRUCTURED FINANCE
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF IOS CAPITAL, LLC ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 1.0 HOURS
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF IOS CAPITAL, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT VALANI, RIAZ IND AND DBA KMS STRUCTURED FINANCE
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF IOS CAPITAL, LLC SERVED MAR-25-2002, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT VALANI, RIAZ IND AND DBA KMS STRUCTURED FINANCE
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF IOS CAPITAL, LLC SERVED MAR-25-2002, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT VALANI, RIAZ IND AND DBA KMS STRUCTURED FINANCE
